method_summary: Paper2Agent transforms static research papers into interactive AI agents by extracting the associated codebase, setting up a reproducible environment, wrapping core analytical features as MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools, and deploying a remote server that an AI agent can connect to for natural language interaction with the paper's methods.
key_innovation: The core innovation is the paradigm shift of turning a passive research paper into an active, interactive AI agent that can demonstrate, apply, and adapt its methods to new user queries via natural language.
title: Paper2Agent: Reimagining Research Papers As Interactive and Reliable AI Agents
